reviews.comment:
Excelente atención tanto en playa como la cafetería! Variedad de productos en góndolas. Baños. Boxes. Aire para ruedas. Aire acondicionando dentro! El la playa siempre te ofrecen sus servicios de limpieza y mantenimiento!  Baños. Taller de Service! Tranquilo para detenerse a tomar un café!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both on the beach and in the cafeteria! Variety of products on shelves. Restrooms. Service bays. Tire inflation. Air conditioning inside! On the beach, they always offer cleaning and maintenance services! Restrooms. Service workshop! A quiet place to stop for a coffee!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHcnMtclZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Hay que tratar de no ir en horario pico , siempre hay autos cargando . Se puede retirar dinero mientras cargas combustible directamente con el playero.

(Translated by Google)
You should try to avoid going during rush hour; there are always cars filling up. You can withdraw money while you're filling up directly from the gas station attendant.
